title: Rewrite it in lisp again
summary: import Aside from "../../components/Aside.astro"; About six months ago I wrote a post about rewriting the tech that publishes this blog.[^1] It seemed like a good idea at the time to try and build something out in Racket and Pollen, and it was a learning experience. In doing this
